_note: Single source of truth for the Past Tense pastel style-lock. The n8n Prepare-Prompt node prepends STYLE_BLOCK_IMAGE to every gpt-image-2 prompt and STYLE_BLOCK_VIDEO to every Veo motion prompt. The Scene Composer writes ONLY the subject + chosen field; it does NOT write the style itself.
STYLE_BLOCK_IMAGE: Flat 2D hand-drawn cartoon illustration, like a simple educational explainer video frame. Visibly hand-drawn with slightly WOBBLY, imperfect dark charcoal ink outlines (#211E1A) of subtly uneven weight, as if drawn by hand with a felt-tip pen — NOT clean smooth vector lines. COMPLETELY FLAT matte color fills: NO gradients, NO shading, NO highlights, NO cel-shading, NO 3D, NO glossy or metallic effects, NO texture, NO photorealism. Soft pastel palette but with clean, warm, cheerful, VIVID colors — never washed-out, greyish or desaturated. Generous negative space, one clear subject. Fill the ENTIRE frame edge-to-edge with the flat background color. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermark, no border or frame.
STYLE_BLOCK_VIDEO: Flat 2D hand-drawn explainer ANIMATION. Everything drawn with visibly wobbly, imperfect warm-charcoal ink outlines (#211E1A) and COMPLETELY FLAT matte fills in a clean, vivid (not washed-out) soft pastel palette — NO gradients, NO shading, NO highlights, NO 3D, NO realism, NO photographic textures, NO glossy or metallic look. The image stays flat and hand-drawn at ALL times and must never morph into 3D, realistic, or photographic rendering. Motion is smooth, gentle and continuous. No text, no letters, no captions anywhere.
vibranceNote: Raw gpt-image-2 reads slightly washed-out; the SceneComposite render applies a mandatory vibrance pass (saturate ~1.32, contrast ~1.1) so output matches the reference channel.
paletteNote: Backgrounds/fields are CHOSEN from this palette per topic and rotated between scenes; never hard-coded. teal = tropical water/islands; desert = warm arid/outback (the orange ground is painted into the illustration). Red (#DA382F) is semantic-only (danger/emphasis), never a background.

veo.note: MANDATORY: always Veo 3.1 Fast @ 1080p. NEVER Veo 3.1 Lite (veo-3.1-lite-generate-001 is banned, decision 2026-07-03). Prefer image-to-video seeded from a gpt-image-2 frame; make seeds 16:9 to avoid pillarbox.
